title: Gendo and Women
wikitext:
[]: Gendo & Women             Quote Post by AsukaChan » Tue Jan 29, 2008 4:15 am It just occurred to me, as I'm sure it has occurred to everyone at some point (and these things take me longer to realize than it does for most people..): That Gendo gets a lot of ass. ... I mean, I can totally see why. Who wouldn't wanna hit that?

[]:             Quote Post by BEsERk EVA01 » Tue Jan 29, 2008 5:08 am What do you mean, "He gets a lot of ass?"

[]:             Quote Post by ZapX » Tue Jan 29, 2008 5:36 am He's teh pimp.

[]:             Quote Post by Ornette » Tue Jan 29, 2008 5:53 am BEsERk EVA01 wrote: What do you mean, "He gets a lot of ass?"

[]:             Quote Post by UrsusArctos » Tue Jan 29, 2008 6:39 am ZapalacX wrote: He's teh Gendo

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Tue Jan 29, 2008 7:40 am Three asses over the course of 15+ years is actually more retrained than one might expect of a "man in power"...

[]:             Quote Post by UrsusArctos » Tue Jan 29, 2008 7:52 am Gendo must have done plenty of other nameless women as well...in fact, I've been planning to give Gendo a little more backstory (excuse the wordplay) on that aspect of his character.

[]:             Quote Post by BrikHaus » Tue Jan 29, 2008 7:53 am Reichu wrote: Three asses over the course of 15+ years is actually more retrained than one might expect of a "man in power"...

[]:             Quote Post by UrsusArctos » Tue Jan 29, 2008 7:57 am Maybe Gendo would be adventurous, but Fuyutsuki... Gah, it's you!!! :@_@:

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Tue Jan 29, 2008 7:57 am UrsusArctos wrote: Gendo must have done plenty of other nameless women as well...

[]:             Quote Post by UrsusArctos » Tue Jan 29, 2008 8:01 am Well, I have the impression he had a certain amount of "practice" charming women...how else does he get on so easily with someone like Yui, who would probably have been in the company of many more suitors? Even if Fuyutsuki hadn't known about her(he was a bit of an antisocial himself) quite a few boys would have known about hawt Yui-sama to be(phrasing deliberate). And Gendo managed it with both Naoko (Who seems to be older to him) and Ritsuko (18 years younger). Yes, he must have had practice. The devil!

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Tue Jan 29, 2008 8:05 am UrsusArctos wrote: Well, I have the impression he had a certain amount of "practice" charming women...

[]:             Quote Post by UrsusArctos » Tue Jan 29, 2008 8:08 am Point taken, but it remains strange that Yui went for somebody with a reputation for being downright shady. Weren't there plenty of much less troubled people out there she could have gone for? Gendo has a nice side, Yui didn't misjudge that, but it's not something she could've seen at first glance. Was there any particular reason Yui went for Gendo?

[]: Re: It Just Occurred to Me. . .             Quote Post by Anti-Goth » Tue Jan 29, 2008 9:14 am AsukaChan wrote: That Gendo gets a lot of ass. ... I mean, I can totally see why. Who wouldn't wanna hit that?

[]:             Quote Post by Sceleris » Tue Jan 29, 2008 10:27 am BrikHaus wrote: Plus, there had to be at least one late night where he and Fuyutsuki got drunk, and became a little adventurous.

[]:             Quote Post by BobBQ » Tue Jan 29, 2008 11:13 am UrsusArctos wrote: Was there any particular reason Yui went for Gendo?

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Tue Jan 29, 2008 11:53 am This is a little long, but I was on a roll... UrsusArctos wrote: Point taken, but it remains strange that Yui went for somebody with a reputation for being downright shady.

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Tue Jan 29, 2008 4:21 pm Brik-kun and Reichu are my newest heroes! Oh wait... Personally, I agree that Yui-sama was the only "practice" the G-man really had.

[]:             Quote Post by AsukaChan » Tue Jan 29, 2008 4:31 pm LOLZ at Brik. I never even thought of that. XDD And this got a lot more replies than I thought it would! On the nameless women, I know that a lot of women like to chase after guys like him because they think they can change him. And I'm pretty sure even Gendo wouldn't turn down the opportunity. XD

[]:             Quote Post by Sachi » Wed Jan 30, 2008 12:25 am As for the Akagi girls; They were both kinda lonely. Wouldn't be surprising at all for them to go after the commander for some "overtime:. Misato probably would have as well if Kaji or Shinji weren't around. I'm he got some techies and office toads as well. Project Ibuki: FIND OUT WHY MAYA IBUKI WON'T SLEEP WITH ME. Project manager- Gendo Ikari 2nd in command- Prof Fuyutsuki Overseer- Lorenz Keel Test subject- Ryoji Kaji
